race.description: Hkjc World Pool Port Adelaide Cup (L)
race.comment: SEA WHAT I SEE (2) is yet to break through this campaign but has been consistently competitive against stronger opposition in Melbourne. She looks to be peaking now, and the reunion with Williams is a positive push. SIR KINGSFORD (3) showed grit last time, leading throughout and finding enough to hold them off. He drops in weight here and should give a bold sight again out in front. BANKERS CHOICE (1) is building into his prep and will relish a genuine tempo. Expect him to be stalking the speed and finishing over the top late. TWILIGHT ELEGANCE (9) continues to improve and should have no trouble stepping up in trip. With J Melham aboard and a light weight, she commands respect. OXFORD BLUE (6) was disappointing last start despite market support, but his prior two runs were sound. Worth another chance at the odds.
